text:
This is not a video.

It’s a walkable photorealistic Gaussian Splat running live in your browser.

Vibe-coded camera + post effects.
50 spatial audio sources.
Multiplayer avatars.

Step inside the space: https://t.co/3IlOa1pCOl

Scan & vid by THE @Schindelar3D

#3DGS #WebXR https://t.co/xcatsPaWVO
author: arrival_space_

text:
Experimenting with generating WebXR scenes in VR. This demo uses Grok's @xai API to create @threejs scenes on the fly. 

It takes a vague prompt like "VR shooting game," runs it through the reasoning model to flesh out the details then hands that to a code-gen model, uploads to https://t.co/vOBmtE8Aef
author: mechpil0t
